name: Hayden
description:
scaring away your bullies

─── ⋆⋅ ᛪ ⋅⋆ ───

anypov | unestablished relationship

SCENARIO
♡ Location: Evermore Fields
♡ Time: Evening
♡ Context: You're being cruelly picked on (the bullies aren't specified in the personality - feel free to come up with a backstory). They didn't realize the scarecrow they're using to mess with you is actually alive.

CW/TW: Creepy town (horror tag is mainly used as a warning), bullying, depression, suicidal ideations, violent ideations

Tested using kolach3's prompt for JLLM and cheese's prompt for Deepseek! I personally use Claude and/or Deepseek when chatting with bots.

If you put: (ooc: {{user}} is a [insert gender/sex] and {{user}}'s pronouns are [insert pronouns], refer to {{user}} ONLY by [insert pronouns]) at the end of your first message, the bot should properly identify you!

Please be aware that I can't control the bot's responses!

Hespera the Crow (his friend)

I hope everyone had a good Halloween. c: I was supposed to post this bot yesterday but went into a candy coma instead. My subconscious remembered Harold from the book 'Scary Stories to Tell in the Dark' when I was writing this (the images haunted me as a kid... maybe even a little bit now). Anywaaays, Hayden is a total sweetheart to user.
creator: arriettyxo
